forbidden_scope: App UI, SDK/MCP full entrypoints, generated clients, or App integration
History list/search/filtering, database/ORM/migration tooling, multi-backend abstraction, hosted service storage, or result store
Browser/runtime executor, Harbor SDK/runtime calls, raw evidence retrieval, live sessions, or Harbor package imports
Harbor, Lode, App, or other repository changes
True-write behavior, write operation execution, write reconciliation, complex retry/recovery, or generic browser agent loops

integration_evidence.summary: Adds dependency-free result and evidence-ref projections plus store-backed query helpers over existing Run Record refs.
Adds GET /runs/:run_id/result and GET /runs/:run_id/evidence-refs using the existing optional local Run Record store binding.
Validates success result query, failure reason query, evidence refs query, redacted/unavailable state, missing run, and invalid run id behavior.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow Core/API read path over existing Run Record refs without golden fixtures, CLI smoke, App integration, storage backends, raw evidence retrieval, or write behavior.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume ADR 0003/0005/0007/0008, the Core result-query helper, API Server routes, self-check output, GH-107 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when golden fixtures, CLI/API smoke, write guardrails, generated clients, App UI, database storage, hosted service storage, real execution, or true-write behavior are added.

commands.note: Validated success result query, failure reason query, evidence refs query, missing/invalid query failures, redacted state, Run Record store, result envelope, and task submission admission.
Validated health/readiness, run summary query, result query, evidence refs query, failure result query, run_not_found, malformed run id, and unknown route behavior.
Validated workspace self-checks, including Core result/evidence query behavior and API Server result/evidence routes.
Validated existing schema fixtures and Run Record conformance with 3 Run Records.

remaining_risks: GH-107 intentionally does not add golden fixtures, API/CLI smoke, write-side guardrails, App UI, raw evidence retrieval, or true writes; GH-108 through GH-110 own those surfaces.
